subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which historical city is known for its forts and palaces?
question_hi: राजस्थान की निवासी शहर, फोटो और मुख्यालय वाली शहर क्या है।
explanation_en: Amber Fort, also known as Kumbhalgarh Fort, is famous for its stunning architecture and strategic location. It is one of the prominent forts in Rajasthan.
